zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel於大約1146年出生在英國越可爾可納雷斯波洛時，他的父親Robert de Stuteville IV32歲，母親Helwise de Murdac26歲。他於1169年與Joan在英國越可爾可廷加姆結婚。他去世於1218年3月30日之前在蘇格蘭洛包爾紐可亞斯特萊頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel于大约1146年出生在英国越可爾可納雷斯波洛时，他的父亲Robert de Stuteville IV32岁，母亲Helwise de Murdac26岁。他于1169年与Joan在英国越可爾可廷加姆结婚。他去世于1218年3月30日之前在苏格兰洛包爾紐可亞斯特萊頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stuteville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Estouteville or Etoutteville in Seine-Maritime.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel was born about 1146, in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Stuteville IV, was 32 and his mother, Helwise de Murdac, was 26. He married Joan in 1169, in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England. He died before 30 March 1218, in Newcastleton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel est né environ 1146, à Knaresborough, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Stuteville IV, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Helwise de Murdac, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan en 1169, à Cottingham, Everwyck, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 30 mars 1218, à Newcastleton, Roxburghshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel um 1146 in Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Stuteville IV 32 und seine Mutter Helwise de Murdac 26. Er hat 1169 in Cottingham, Yorkshire, England Joan geheiratet. Er starb vor 30. März 1218 in Newcastleton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel è nato il circa 1146 nel Knaresborough, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Stuteville IV, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Helwise de Murdac, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan nel 1169, nel Cottingham, Yorkshire, England. Morì prima del 30 marzo 1218, nel Newcastleton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddelが約1146年にイギリスヨークシュアイアナレスボロウで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IVは32歳，母Helwise de Murdacは26歳であった。1169年にイギリスヨークシュアイアコッティンガムでJoanと結婚した。彼は1218年3月30日以前にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアニューカストレトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel(이)가 대략 1146년 영국 요르크실르 나레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville IV(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Helwise de Murdac(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1169년 영국 요르크실르 컷잉함에서 Joan(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1218년 3월 30일 이전 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르 뉴카스틀레턴에서 사망했다.

mn.about 1146–before 30 March 1218: ойролцоогоор 1146 он–1218 оны Гуравдугаар сарын 30–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel nasceu aproximadamente 1146, em Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville IV, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Helwise de Murdac, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan em 1169, em Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 30 de março de 1218, em Newcastleton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel родился около 1146 г. в местности наресбороую, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville IV было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Helwise de Murdac, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan в 1169 г. в местности коттингхам, еркшир, Англия. Он умер перед 30 марта 1218 г. в местности нюкастлетон, роксбургшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas de Stuteville Lord of Liddel nació aproximadamente 1146, en Knaresborough, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Stuteville IV, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Helwise de Murdac, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joan en 1169, en Cottingham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 30 de marzo de 1218, en Newcastleton, Roxburghshire, Scotland.
